results.rendered_html: 1. vayā f. Zweig, Ast  ṚV. 6,7,6 . tvatsaubhagāni vi yanti vanino na vayāḥ 13,1 . vṛkṣasya 24,3 . 57,5 . 2,5,4 . 5,1,1 . 8,13,6 . 17 . 10,92,3 . 134,6 .  ŚĀṄKH. GṚHY. 1,15 . bildlich  ṚV. 1,59,1 . vayā idanyā bhuvanānyasya 2,35,8 . 8,19 . 33 . Zweig so v. a. Geschlecht, Sippe: paśyannanyasyā atithiṃ vayāyāḥ 10,124,3 .
